name: X Documentation MCP Presets
description: Official hosted MCP server for X documentation at docs.x.com/mcp.
setup_hint: No local auth is required. Kyberion connects directly to https://docs.x.com/mcp over the MCP Streamable HTTP transport.

list_tools.description: List the X documentation MCP tools.

call_tool.description: Invoke an X documentation MCP tool by name with structured arguments.
